{{Missing Info}}

= Thanksgiving Event =
[[File:Thanksgiving Event Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Thanksgiving Event]]
Nov. 22 - Nov. 28 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=104
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{ImageWithLink|Celestial Throne|orange}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Horn of Abundance|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Pardoned Turkey|green}}

= Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithText|Wine Jar|orange}} ([[Taoist Yu Ji]] Decoration)
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Wine Stove|purple}} ([[Taoist Yu Ji]] Decoration)
* {{RewardIconWithText|Wine Tag|blue}} ([[Taoist Yu Ji]] Decoration)
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Wine Urn|green}} ([[Taoist Yu Ji]] Decoration)

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Treant|orange|Robots}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Festive Flower Truck|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Whispering Praise|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
